description: Perform a blade pitch angle sweep simulation to find the optimal pitch setting for the loaded rotor project. Configure the simulation for a pitch angle range of -2 to 15 degrees with a 1-degree step size, a fixed Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) of 7, and a wind speed of 10 m/s. Save the project with the simulation results to /home/ga/Documents/projects/pitch_sweep_result.wpa.
